'''âv-w-t-sh''' ('''kavawteshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacation|vacation]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacation|vacation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-w-t-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kavawteshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivawteshoko|thivawteshoko]] || [[word:jivawteshoko|jivawteshoko]] || [[word:shivawteshoko|shivawteshoko]] || [[word:kivawteshoko|kivawteshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvawteshoko|thuthuvawteshoko]] || [[word:jujuvawteshoko|jujuvawteshoko]] || [[word:shushuvawteshoko|shushuvawteshoko]] || [[word:kukuvawteshoko|kukuvawteshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovawteshoko|thovawteshoko]] || [[word:jovawteshoko|jovawteshoko]] || [[word:shovawteshoko|shovawteshoko]] || [[word:kovawteshoko|kovawteshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvawteshoko|thĂŠvawteshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvawteshoko|jĂŠvawteshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvawteshoko|shĂŠvawteshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvawteshoko|kĂŠvawteshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
